---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new BPMN element, SDK method, or engine capability
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What gap or limitation prompted this request? Describe the workflow or use case that is blocked or awkward today.

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like — new BPMN element support, API method, configuration option, etc.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds or alternative approaches have you tried or thought about?

## BPMN / API sketch (optional)

If applicable, show a rough BPMN snippet or TypeScript API sketch of what you have in mind:

```xml
<!-- BPMN sketch -->
```

```typescript
// SDK API sketch
```

## Additional context

Related issues, links to BPMN 2.0 spec sections, or examples from other engines.
